svg.desc: knight-idle idle_2: Generate a self-contained SVG 2D game asset. Use transparent background. No full-canvas background or opaque backdrop. Fit the requested frame size exactly. Set shape-rendering="crispEdges" on the SVG root. Use viewBox matching the requested size. Target size: 64x64. Output media type: image/svg+xml. Game character sprite. Readable body/head silhouette. Keep animation frames consistent. Feet or base should sit near bottom center. pixel art low-resolution readable clusters limited palette hard edges, no soft painterly gradients Composition contract: front-facing full-body sprite feet anchored near bottom center centered object inside frame with no crop Palette hint: steel blue armor. Palette hint: bright face/visor contrast. Palette hint: one readable accent color for weapon or shield. readable at 32x32 through helmet/body split readable at 64x64 with weapon silhouette readable at 128x128 with armor detail but no clutter Subject: knight. Visual archetype: armored_character. armored character knight. helmeted knight silhouette compact readable RPG character shape helmet small armor body weapon or shield hint transparent background SVG shape hints: circle or rect helmet; rect body armor; path sword or shield silhouette. No photorealistic. No blur. No low contrast. No cropped. No inconsistent frames. No busy background. No full-canvas background. No landscape-only image. No anti-aliased painterly render. No photo texture. No modern clothing. No photorealistic render. No background scene.
